purpose: Initializes program variables by accepting current date, parameters from SYSIN, and setting default values for expiry days, checkpoint frequency, and debug flag.
Reads the next pending authorization summary segment from the IMS database and updates read counters and end-of-file status accordingly.
Retrieves the next authorization detail segment using IMS GNP call and updates detail read count and flag indicating if more details exist for the current summary.
Determines if an authorization detail is expired based on the difference between current date and authorization date, and adjusts approval/decline counts and amounts if it qualifies for deletion.
Deletes the current authorization detail segment from the IMS database and increments the deleted detail counter if successful, otherwise abends.
Reads the next pending authorization detail segment from the IMS database and updates read count and control flags accordingly.
Deletes the current pending authorization summary segment from the IMS database and increments the deletion counter if successful.
Takes an IMS checkpoint and optionally displays progress information based on frequency settings.
Reads the next pending authorization summary segment from the IMS database and updates counters, current application ID, and end-of-file status.
Takes an IMS checkpoint and optionally displays progress information based on frequency settings.
Abends the program with return code 16 when an unexpected IMS status code is encountered during authorization summary read.
Abends the program with return code 16 when an unexpected IMS status code is encountered during authorization detail read.
Abends the program with return code 16 when an authorization detail deletion fails due to an unexpected IMS status.
Abends the program with return code 16 when an authorization summary deletion fails due to an unexpected IMS status.
Abends the program with return code 16 when a checkpoint operation fails due to an unexpected IMS status.
